name: Atticus & Zoe
description:
Drunken games with your bf and his old friend turning spicy. 🥵

What to know:

- fem pov (ik ik, im sorry—any POVs are otw)

- you and Atticus are dating.

- Zoe is his childhood best friend, they never dated, she left at 16, came back at 21 and now attends the same college where you met Atticus.

- Zoe is coded to like you both but she’s like obsessed with pissing you off and turning you on.

Two drops in a day, I’ve been working on these for the last day or two and I’m toooo excited to even talk anymore.

If you’re here you should be grown enough to know if this is or isn’t for you.

It’s actually for me, I’m just sharing it.

(you’re welcome pooks)

Nothing smutty happens in the intro but it can def spiral REAL quick into that so beware.

That should be all, I’m sure I’ll be updating these further.

Also peep the song, and Atticus’s last name—fits right?? Ik I’m the best.

Enough blabbing. Enjoy.

And ty again to MARIELLA for the gorgeous pics. 💋
creator: anxiety.becomes.me
